code: import axios from"axios";const BACKEND_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL||"http://localhost:8000";const API_URL="".concat(BACKEND_URL.replace(/\/$/,""),"/api");const client=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL,timeout:30000});client.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("tripgenie_token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export function setAuthToken(token){if(token){localStorage.setItem("tripgenie_token",token);}else{localStorage.removeItem("tripgenie_token");}}export function getAuthToken(){return localStorage.getItem("tripgenie_token");}export async function signup(payload){const _await$client$post=await client.post("/auth/signup",payload),data=_await$client$post.data;return data;}export async function login(payload){const _await$client$post2=await client.post("/auth/login",payload),data=_await$client$post2.data;return data;}export async function googleLogin(credential){const _await$client$post3=await client.post("/auth/google",{credential}),data=_await$client$post3.data;return data;}export async function getMe(){const _await$client$get=await client.get("/auth/me"),data=_await$client$get.data;return data;}export async function planTrip(payload){const _await$client$post4=await client.post("/trips/plan",payload),data=_await$client$post4.data;return data;}export async function getTrip(id){const _await$client$get2=await client.get("/trips/".concat(id)),data=_await$client$get2.data;return data;}export async function listTrips(){const _await$client$get3=await client.get("/trips"),data=_await$client$get3.data;return data;}export async function deleteTrip(id){const _await$client$delete=await client.delete("/trips/".concat(id)),data=_await$client$delete.data;return data;}export{API_URL};
